title: Jagg Island Detention Center
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Jagg Island Detention Center''' was a penal facility on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], located on the eponymous [[Jagg Island]].

[[Davith Sconn]] was incarcerated here in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] and remained a prisoner until at least [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], suggesting that the facility was taken over intact by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and indeed that it remained in operation through the repeated liberations and reconquests of Coruscant between [[6 ABY/Legends|6]] and [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]] .

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1st}}
